description: GitHub Actions CI — typecheck and E2E test workflows on every push and PR, with runtime Node PATH resolution replacing hardcoded fnm paths

userStories.title: Fix hardcoded fnm PATH in test files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E test files to resolve the Node binary directory at runtime so tests work both locally (fnm) and in CI (setup-node).
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/helpers/cli.ts that exports a runCLI(args, extraEnv?) function using PATH set to `path.dirname(process.execPath) + path.delimiter + (process.env.PATH ?? '')` — this resolves to the bin dir of the currently running node binary
Replace every hardcoded `/home/vscode/.fnm/node-versions/v22.22.0/installation/bin` string in all test files with the runtime-resolved path from the shared helper or inline `process.execPath` pattern
The shared runCLI helper uses TSX = resolve(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/.bin/tsx') and CLI = resolve(process.cwd(), 'src/index.ts')
All existing test files that define their own runCLI or E2E_PATH are updated to use the shared helper or inline process.execPath
npm test passes (no 'command not found' or 'spawn' errors)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Typecheck GitHub Actions workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a CI workflow that runs npm run typecheck on every push and PR so TypeScript errors are caught without running E2E tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .github/workflows/typecheck.yml
Workflow is named 'Typecheck' and has a job named 'typecheck'
Triggers on push (all branches) and pull_request (all branches): `on: [push, pull_request]`
Uses actions/checkout@v4
Uses actions/setup-node@v4 with node-version: '22' and cache: 'npm'
Runs `npm ci` then `npm run typecheck`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: E2E test GitHub Actions workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a CI workflow that runs the full test suite on every push and PR so regressions are caught before merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .github/workflows/test.yml
Workflow is named 'Test' and has a job named 'test'
Triggers on push (all branches) and pull_request (all branches): `on: [push, pull_request]`
Uses actions/checkout@v4
Uses actions/setup-node@v4 with node-version: '22' and cache: 'npm'
Runs `npm ci` then `npm test`
Job sets `timeout-minutes: 20` to allow for faucet retry backoff (up to 30 retries x ~5s each per wallet)
Typecheck passes
